qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing ReadTimeout default enables Slowloris-variant slow body DoS against main HTTP server
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same Caddy project but different vulnerable code and root cause: missing http.Server ReadTimeout in app.go/server.go causes slow-body DoS, not MatchHost case-folding failure in matchers.go for host lists larger than 100.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described MatchHost root cause: large host lists using a case-sensitive optimized lookup and bypassing the case-insensitive fallback in modules/caddyhttp/matchers.go.
evidence: The advisory concerns Caddy's HTTP host request matcher, specifically MatchHost.MatchWithError and the large-list path for more than 100 hostnames.
The missing_read_timeout_slowloris_dos qualifying finding describes Caddy http.Server ReadTimeout defaults and slow request body resource exhaustion, not host matcher case handling.

Searches of final reports and session artifacts found no qualifying finding referencing MatchHost, modules/caddyhttp/matchers.go, large host lists, binary-search host matching, or strings.EqualFold bypass.
